title: Investigate then implement
summary: Read-only research, Lead synthesis, then one bounded coder delivery.
useWhen: The task needs exploration before bounding
Uncertainty is high enough to warrant a read-only pass

phases.intent: Dispatch one read-only research lane to map the problem space.
adaptations: Research is not auto-injected into worker system prompt

phases.intent: Lead reads research output and synthesizes a bounded implementation task.
adaptations: Skip if research confirms the task was already bounded

phases.intent: Dispatch one bounded coder lane with delivery mode.
adaptations: Use delivery spec for code changes

phases.intent: Observe the coder via run_wait until terminal.
Collect, review delivery paths, and decide.

escalation.advisor: Only for one named design question unresolved by research.
escalation.auditor: Only for one named residual risk after implementation.
